---
title: "network_watcher.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\new_world_seed\.agents\scripts\network_watcher.py"
loc: 145
complexity: 18
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.69
intel_score: 2.50
overall_score: 1.05
---

## Intent
The `network_watcher.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on get_theme, run_fishtest, log_rejection, process_file, watch. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via get_theme, run_fishtest, log_rejection, process_file, watch. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)
- [latency_check](file://latency_check)
- [merge_traces](file://merge_traces)

### Exports
- `get_theme`
- `run_fishtest`
- `log_rejection`
- `process_file`
- `watch`
